note: seq=118: COMPLETE OFF-BOX DR. User pasted the Hetzner pubkey into InterServer authorized_keys. This: (1) tests ssh Hetzner->InterServer with /etc/atlas/offbox_dr.key (no password); (2) if OK, rsyncs the backup .csv.gz dumps + brain/config tar + last_backup.json to InterServer /var/backups/atlas-hetzner/ and verifies the remote dump count; (3) wires ATLAS_BACKUP_OFFBOX_CMD for future nightly copies; publishes offbox-dr.json (ssh_ok, rsync_ok, offbox_copied, remote_dump_count). On ssh failure it captures the exact stderr. Daily timer (03:30, after the 02:40 backup). --no-block (rsync of dumps takes time). Verified complete (69L, __main__, compile).

steps.note: seq=118: off-box DR ssh-test + rsync dumps to InterServer (true disk-failure DR).

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import hashlib,sys; w={'/opt/atlas/importers/atlas_offbox_dr.py':'5dd718d3ada68cdd10803f9680f4d693216c353546af9722e48d994a7ee00102'}; [sys.exit('SHA MISMATCH '+p) for p,h in w.items() if hashlib.sha256(open(p,'rb').read()).hexdigest()!=h]; print('offbox sha ok')"

steps.content:
[Unit]
Description=ATLAS off-box DR (rsync backup dumps to InterServer)
After=network-online.target

[Service]
Type=oneshot
Nice=15
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/db.env
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/autopull.env
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/atlas/audit.env
ExecStart=/opt/atlas/venv/bin/python /opt/atlas/importers/atlas_offbox_dr.py
TimeoutStartSec=1900

[Unit]
Description=ATLAS off-box DR daily (after nightly backup)

[Timer]
OnBootSec=8min
OnCalendar=*-*-* 03:30:00
Persistent=true

[Install]
WantedBy=timers.target

steps.cmd: /opt/atlas/venv/bin/python -c "import os,subprocess as s; keys=['STATUS_TOKEN','STATUS_REPO','STATUS_API_BASE','STATUS_BRANCH','NODE_ID']; open('/etc/atlas/audit.env','w').write(chr(10).join('%s=%s'%(k,os.environ[k]) for k in keys if os.environ.get(k))+chr(10)); os.chmod('/etc/atlas/audit.env',0o600); s.run(['systemctl','daemon-reload']); s.run(['systemctl','enable','atlas-offbox-dr.timer']); s.run(['systemctl','start','atlas-offbox-dr.timer']); s.run(['systemctl','reset-failed','atlas-offbox-dr.service']); s.run(['systemctl','start','--no-block','atlas-offbox-dr.service']); print('offbox-dr running (ssh test + rsync)')"
